name: knowledge-arch
description: Scaffold and audit a layered agent-knowledge architecture across repos: graph-first code structure (Graphify), Diataxis docs, a lean AGENTS.md (+ CLAUDE.md @import wrapper), path-scoped .claude/rules, skills for procedures, machine-local auto-memory, and a versioned constitution. Required rules live in committed files; memory is recall, not a source of truth. Codex parity via nested AGENTS.md.
